title: Talk About Family and Friends
description: Talk about family and friends in Hindi.

blocks.title: Talk About Family
blocks.context: You talk about your family using respectful forms.
blocks.goal: Mention at least two family members and one feeling word.
usefulPhrases: यह मेरी माँ हैं। (This is my mother.)
यह मेरे पिता हैं। (This is my father.)
मेरा भाई खुश है। (My brother is happy.)

blocks.prompt: Speak for 45 seconds about your family. Use polite forms when you mention elders.
